case_title: CARTON-HODGSON,INC. VS CREATIVE DIRECT MARKETING GROUP, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CARTON-HODGSON,INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CREATIVE DIRECT MARKETING GROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
